metadata.description: Business idea development toolkit — scaffold, pushback, evaluate, and forge disruptive ideas

plugins.name: ideation-copilot
plugins.description: Structured business idea development with /idea:new (scaffold), /idea:pushback (stress-test), /idea:evaluate (score), and /idea:forge (iterate). Includes VC and market evaluation agents, lean canvas, assumption tracking, PMF strategy, and experiment planning.
